title: Cobblemon: Dark Edition
description: Darker and cleaner textures for core Cobblemon blocks like PC, Healer, Pasture, Fossil Machines, and more.
body: ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1328178/description_cc7d2600-978f-48cd-844f-85327c0525b1.png) # 🌑 **Cobblemon: Dark Edition** _Tired of blinding white machines in your Pokémon world?_ **Cobblemon: Dark Edition** brings a modern, sleek, and immersive aesthetic to your adventure by darkening the textures of the most iconic Cobblemon utility blocks — all while keeping important visual cues like screens and lights clear and easy to read. Perfect for moody builds, shader users, or anyone who wants a more polished interface style. ![item image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1289/965/2025-08-16_15-09-46-personnalisa-c-png.png)![item image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1289/966/2025-08-16_15-10-11-personnalisa-c-png.png) *** ## 🎨 What’s Included This pack replaces the default textures of several Cobblemon machines with a clean, dark theme: * 🖥️ **PC** – Reimagined with black casing and glowing screens * 💉 **Healer** – Dark metal tones with updated trays and effects * 🧬 **Fossil Analyzer** – Shadowy casing, readable data slots * 🧪 **Restoration Tank** – Darkened with lightly glowing glass panels * 🐑 **Pasture** – Subtle dark wood and metal, **straw preserved** for authenticity * 🖼️ **Display Case** – Sides, tops, internals and lighting now cohesive and elegant * 📺 **Monitor & Terminals** – Now blend into your lab builds without being eyesores 🔧 LED lights and holographic displays are preserved or slightly enhanced to maintain **clarity and usability** in all lighting conditions. *** ## 🛠️ Compatibility * ✅ Minecraft **1.21 – 1.21.1** & **1.20. – 1.20.1** * ✅ Cobblemon **1.4+** * 🧩 Works perfectly with **any modpack using Cobblemon**, including [Cobblemon Realms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-realms) This is a **pure resource pack** — it does not affect gameplay or require any mods to function. *** ## 🧾 Installation 1. Download the `.zip` file from the **Files** tab 2. Drop it into your `resourcepacks/` folder 3. Enable it in the Minecraft launcher 4. (Optional) Press `F3 + T` in-game to reload resources ⚠️ Make sure this pack is **above** any others in the list for its changes to apply correctly. *** ## 📷 Recommended Settings * 🎮 Best enjoyed with shaders or darker lighting configs * 🎨 Looks great in modern Pokémon Centers, labs, or black-themed bases * 💡 Works well with minimal UIs or other interface mods (such as FancyMenu) *** ## 🧑‍🎨 Credits & Info This pack is a standalone creation inspired by [Cobblemon Realms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-realms). All textures were edited or redesigned in high-quality pixel art to match the **Cobblemon aesthetic**, but with a darker tone. *** ## 💬 Feedback & Suggestions Want another block converted? Have an idea for future improvements? 👉 Join us on Discord and let’s make it better together: [**https://discord.gg/kb8NSTF45n**](https://discord.gg/kb8NSTF45n)
